  "plan": "I'll create a simple init script that sets up basic system functionality, mounts necessary filesystems, and starts a shell on ttyS0 as requested. The init script will be the first program executed by the kernel.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "cat > init << 'EOF'
#!/bin/sh

# Mount necessary filesystems
mount -t proc none /proc
mount -t sysfs none /sys
mount -t devtmpfs none /dev

# Create device nodes (in case devtmpfs didn't)
mknod -m 666 /dev/null c 1 3 2>/dev/null || true
mknod -m 666 /dev/zero c 1 5 2>/dev/null || true

# Print boot message
echo "Custom Linux Kernel Booted Successfully"
echo "Login as 'root' with no password"

# Start shell on serial console
setsid sh -c 'exec sh </dev/ttyS0 >/dev/ttyS0 2>&1'
EOF
",
      "duration": 0.5
    }
  ],
  "task_complete": false
}
